reasoning: The Wikipedia page for 'FIDE rankings' uses the official FIDE rating list published on the 1st of every month, meaning the ratings on March 15 and March 22 will be identical (the March 2026 ratings). Even if live ratings were somehow considered or if FIDE published unexpectedly, a 1% increase on a 2795 rating requires gaining roughly 28 points, which is mathematically and practically nearly impossible for a super-GM in one week, especially since Caruana's next major tournament (the Candidates) does not begin until March 29. Thus, his rating on Wikipedia will unequivocally not be 1% higher on March 22 compared to March 15.
